subject: Discrete Random Variables
topic: §15 Expected Value of a Discrete Random Variable
question: An urn contains 10 marbles in which 3 are black. Four of the marbles are selected at random (without replacement) and are tested for the black color. Define the random variable $X$ to be the number of the selected marbles that are not black. (a) Find the probability mass function of $X$. (b) What is the cumulative distribution function of $X$? (c) Find the expected value of $X$.
